channel.title: Vaibhav Acharya, engineer.
channel.description: Software Engineer at Netlify. I work at the seam where product, design and engineering stop being separate jobs.

item.title: Deep Dive into JavaScript Array Methods
item.description: Map, forEach, filter, reduce explained from scratch

item.title: Deep Dive into JavaScript Sorting
item.description: Array.prototype.sort explained, custom comparators, and stability quirks

item.title: Functional Programming in JavaScript
item.description: A guide to functional programming in JavaScript

item.title: JavaScript Closures and Scope
item.description: Demystify closures with practical patterns like private counters and once-only functions while visualising the scope chain

item.title: Caching Strategies from Scratch
item.description: LRU, LFU, TTL, write-through, write-back, and cache stampedes explained with interactive demos
